_comment: coderef-core MCP server is REPO-AGNOSTIC (WO-MCP-REPO-AGNOSTIC-ANY-REPO-001): every tool invocation must pass project_root explicitly — there is no default repo. Launch is PORTABLE: 'npx coderef-mcp-server' resolves the published bin (package.json bin.coderef-mcp-server) cwd- and path-independently, so this manifest carries no absolute machine paths. The --project-dir anchor was dropped — it only ever defaulted relative-project_root resolution to process.cwd(), which the absolute-per-call any-repo contract never relies on.
